# Word Not

Word form of logical NOT

```perl
$not_result = not $condition;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$not_result = not $condition;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$not_result = not $condition;
```

### Inferred Perl Output
